item.title: Engram: Building AI Memory That Actually Reasons
item.description: Why I built a bi-temporal knowledge graph on Neo4j to solve the one problem every AI-assisted workflow runs into: the context window resets, but the work doesn't.
item.author: ulric@ulrictodman.com (Ulric Todman)

item.title: Hip Hop Trivia: From Bootcamp jQuery Project to a Game Worth Finishing
item.description: What started as a weekend assignment in 2018 became one of the projects I keep coming back to. Here's why a hip-hop trivia game with a vintage-TV aesthetic still has a future.
item.author: ulric@ulrictodman.com (Ulric Todman)
